markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Abnormal and GrowthX's weekly sync to review content performance, get approvals on new content topics, and align on product positioning accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/jijfxTnUT5eE15xT6b4PnkwrBsXx94z3?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Performance success**: Impressions increased dramatically (300%) with newly published content, climbing from 28,000 to 114,000 impressions](https://fathom.video/share/jijfxTnUT5eE15xT6b4PnkwrBsXx94z3?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [**Content alignment issues**: Need to avoid topics like data loss prevention where Abnormal doesn't have current product offerings (though it's in roadmap)](https://fathom.video/share/jijfxTnUT5eE15xT6b4PnkwrBsXx94z3?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)
  - [**Strategic focus**: Need to prioritize AI security, email security, threat intelligence, and vertical-specific content that accurately represents Abnormal's capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/jijfxTnUT5eE15xT6b4PnkwrBsXx94z3?tab=summary&timestamp=483.0)
  - [**Content approval process**: Team will implement better review procedures to ensure content aligns with product capabilities before publishing](https://fathom.video/share/jijfxTnUT5eE15xT6b4PnkwrBsXx94z3?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Growth

  - [Impressive 300% growth in impressions from 28,000 to 114,000](https://fathom.video/share/jijfxTnUT5eE15xT6b4PnkwrBsXx94z3?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)
  - [Nearly 60 articles published in past three weeks](https://fathom.video/share/jijfxTnUT5eE15xT6b4PnkwrBsXx94z3?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [Top performing articles: "Data Loss Prevention Strategies for Small Businesses," "Cybersecurity Solutions," "Surface Management Strategies," and "Exchange Vulnerability Assessment"](https://fathom.video/share/jijfxTnUT5eE15xT6b4PnkwrBsXx94z3?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
  - [Content typically starts on lower search pages (6-7) and takes weeks to gain traction](https://fathom.video/share/jijfxTnUT5eE15xT6b4PnkwrBsXx94z3?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)

### Product Alignment Concerns

  - [Data loss prevention is not currently part of Abnormal's product offering (though in roadmap)](https://fathom.video/share/jijfxTnUT5eE15xT6b4PnkwrBsXx94z3?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)
  - [Legal and product team concerns about promoting capabilities that don't exist yet](https://fathom.video/share/jijfxTnUT5eE15xT6b4PnkwrBsXx94z3?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
  - [Abnormal team clarified they prefer educational content that doesn't imply product capabilities they don't have](https://fathom.video/share/jijfxTnUT5eE15xT6b4PnkwrBsXx94z3?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
  - [Competitors have acquired companies with DLP capabilities, making it a sensitive competitive topic](https://fathom.video/share/jijfxTnUT5eE15xT6b4PnkwrBsXx94z3?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
  - [Need to update writing guidelines to clarify how to handle these topics](https://fathom.video/share/jijfxTnUT5eE15xT6b4PnkwrBsXx94z3?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)

### Content Strategy Refinements

  - [Focus on "star keywords" Abnormal wants to own: AI security, email security, behavioral AI](https://fathom.video/share/jijfxTnUT5eE15xT6b4PnkwrBsXx94z3?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Prioritize vertical-specific content (consistently requested by field/channel marketers)](https://fathom.video/share/jijfxTnUT5eE15xT6b4PnkwrBsXx94z3?tab=summary&timestamp=1732.0)
  - [Need to balance high-volume keywords with targeting the right personas](https://fathom.video/share/jijfxTnUT5eE15xT6b4PnkwrBsXx94z3?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
  - [Mariana is extracting keywords from Abnormal's LinkedIn posts and event schedules](https://fathom.video/share/jijfxTnUT5eE15xT6b4PnkwrBsXx94z3?tab=summary&timestamp=899.0)
  - [For threat intelligence content, should focus on need for partners rather than DIY solutions (as Abnormal plans to launch threat intelligence services)](https://fathom.video/share/jijfxTnUT5eE15xT6b4PnkwrBsXx94z3?tab=summary&timestamp=1463.0)

### Collaboration Process Improvements

  - [Emily will review topic ideas more thoroughly before approval](https://fathom.video/share/jijfxTnUT5eE15xT6b4PnkwrBsXx94z3?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Mariana will paste ideas in Slack channel to make review easier](https://fathom.video/share/jijfxTnUT5eE15xT6b4PnkwrBsXx94z3?tab=summary&timestamp=984.0)
  - [Abnormal is developing a brand bible that will provide clearer guidelines on positioning](https://fathom.video/share/jijfxTnUT5eE15xT6b4PnkwrBsXx94z3?tab=summary&timestamp=1354.0)
  - [Abnormal's "Abnormal Intelligence" hub moving from subdomain to main domain](https://fathom.video/share/jijfxTnUT5eE15xT6b4PnkwrBsXx94z3?tab=summary&timestamp=1553.0)
  - [Team will meet with Abdallah to clarify content guidelines regarding product capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/jijfxTnUT5eE15xT6b4PnkwrBsXx94z3?tab=summary&timestamp=1712.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Mariana to share content ideas in Slack for review after the meeting](https://fathom.video/share/jijfxTnUT5eE15xT6b4PnkwrBsXx94z3?tab=summary&timestamp=984.0)
  - [Emily and Callie to review content ideas more thoroughly and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/jijfxTnUT5eE15xT6b4PnkwrBsXx94z3?tab=summary&timestamp=1712.0)
  - [Team to develop clearer guidelines about how to handle topics where Abnormal doesn't have current capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/jijfxTnUT5eE15xT6b4PnkwrBsXx94z3?tab=summary&timestamp=1463.0)
  - [Abnormal to share external-facing version of brand bible when finalized](https://fathom.video/share/jijfxTnUT5eE15xT6b4PnkwrBsXx94z3?tab=summary&timestamp=1354.0)
  - [Continue developing vertical-specific content and AI-related content as priorities](https://fathom.video/share/jijfxTnUT5eE15xT6b4PnkwrBsXx94z3?tab=summary&timestamp=1732.0)
  - [Team to meet with Abdallah to align on content strategy and product messaging](https://fathom.video/share/jijfxTnUT5eE15xT6b4PnkwrBsXx94z3?tab=summary&timestamp=1712.0)
